data-source.name: Microsoft SQL Server LocalDB (JetBrains)
data-source.jdbc-url: Data Source=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Initial Catalog=master;Integrated Security=True;Connect Timeout=30;Encrypt=False;Trust Server Certificate=False;Application Intent=ReadWrite;Multi Subnet Failover=False

data-source.name: Microsoft SQL Server LocalDB (JetBrains) [2]
data-source.jdbc-url: Data Source=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Initial Catalog=apbd2;Integrated Security=True;Connect Timeout=30;Encrypt=False;Trust Server Certificate=False;Application Intent=ReadWrite;Multi Subnet Failover=False
